Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild anemia (low hemoglobin) with otherwise normal red cell indices, suggesting possible early or mild normocytic anemia. Platelet count is normal, but platelet distribution width is elevated, which may indicate increased platelet size variability, possibly due to reactive or regenerative processes. No leukocyte abnormalities detected. Correlation with clinical context and further evaluation for anemia etiology is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Azienda Ospedaliera Sant'Antonio Abate - Gallarate
